aronui.when_to_use: When you need to create a simple structured document (contract, letter, message, template) in .txt, .md, or .docx format.
aronui.output_shape: The tool returns a success message with file path, format, and size.

pitfalls.text: All required fields (document_type, content, filename) must be provided; missing any may cause errors.
Empty content field yields: '[ERROR] No content provided for document.'
Filename defaults to 'document.txt' if omitted (based on observed behavior), but it is recommended to specify.
Only .txt, .md, .docx extensions are supported; others may lead to undefined behavior.

procedure: Provide content as a string with document text, optionally using {{PLACEHOLDERS}}.
Provide filename with one of the supported extensions (.txt, .md, .docx).
Optionally specify format (text, markdown, word) if different from filename extension.
Call the tool with the required parameters.
verification: Check that the tool returns a success message containing 'Document created!' and the file path.
Verify the file path includes the expected filename and format.
Ensure no error messages like 'No content provided' are returned.

predict_records.predicted: error: missing required field(s): document_type, content, filename
predict_records.actual: error: [ERROR] No content provided for document.
